name: specbox-engine
displayName: SpecBox Engine — Agentic Dev for Claude Code
description: Install and manage SpecBox Engine: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and Engram memory for Claude Code agentic development.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with SpecBox Engine
walkthroughs.description: Set up agentic development for Claude Code in 3 steps.

steps.title: Check Prerequisites
steps.description:
Verify that Node.js, Python 3.12+, and Claude Code are installed.

[Run Health Check](command:specbox.healthCheck)

steps.title: Install Engine
steps.description:
Install 15 skills, 20+ hooks, and quality settings with one click.

[Install SpecBox Engine](command:specbox.install)

steps.title: Configure MCP Servers
steps.description:
Set up SpecBox MCP server and Engram persistent memory for Claude Code.

[Configure MCP](command:specbox.configureMcp)

steps.title: Onboard Your First Project
steps.description:
Create a CLAUDE.md from the engine template and start using /prd, /plan, /implement.

[Open Onboarding Wizard](command:specbox.onboard)

viewsWelcome.contents:
SpecBox Engine is not installed yet.

[Install Engine](command:specbox.install)

Or run the guided setup:

[Start Onboarding Wizard](command:specbox.onboard)

[Learn more](https://github.com/jpsdeveloper/specbox-engine)

specbox.enginePath.description: Path to the SpecBox Engine repository. Auto-detected if empty.

specbox.autoHealthCheck.description: Run health check on startup when a SpecBox project is detected.

specbox.mcpAutoStart.description: Automatically configure MCP servers (SpecBox + Engram) on install.

specbox.dashboardUrl.description: URL for the Sala de Maquinas dashboard.
